channel.title: Agente Aleatório
channel.description: Constantemente aumentando a entropia do universo.

item.title: Welcome to your blog
item.content:encoded:
This is your first post!

Edit it and start blogging!

Markdown Formatting:

https://rochacbruno.github.io/marmite/markdown-format.html

Theme customization

https://rochacbruno.github.io/marmite/customizing-templates.html
